hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Operations Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 13 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in Operations Management covers production and operations, ERP, logistics and supply chain, operations research, services operations, total quality management, and production planning for professionals targeting plant management or operations director roles. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000. Super/Dual spec — pair with Supply Chain or Analytics. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off).

about.body:
Operations Management is the MBA specialization for professionals who manage the physical and process core of organisations: plant managers, production supervisors, logistics heads, and operations analysts targeting VP Operations, COO, or manufacturing director roles. The MUJ Online MBA in Operations Management covers the full operations scope with 13 spec subjects across Sem 3-4: production planning, ERP, logistics and supply chain, operations research, services operations, and total quality management.

MUJ's Super/Dual specialization allows Operations Management students to pair this spec with Supply Chain Management (for end-to-end supply chain leadership), Analytics and Data Science (for data-driven operations and Industry 4.0 roles), or Project Management (for EPC and infrastructure operations roles). The dual credential strengthens the candidate's profile for cross-functional leadership positions.

The Coursera Plus bundle at Rs 3,999 gives Operations students access to supply chain management, operations analytics, and lean management courses from Rutgers University and University of California — cost-effective certifications that complement the MUJ curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Operations strategy, competitive priorities, and linking production decisions to business strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying operations management theory to a real-world manufacturing or service challenge.

sem3Subjects.name: Production and Operations Management
sem3Subjects.description: Facility layout, aggregate production planning, capacity management, scheduling, and productivity improvement.

sem3Subjects.name: Enterprise Resource Planning
sem3Subjects.description: ERP architecture, SAP and Oracle modules relevant to manufacturing, and integration of production data.

sem3Subjects.name: Logistics and Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Supply chain network design, logistics operations, warehousing strategy, and transportation management.

sem3Subjects.name: Operations Research
sem3Subjects.description: Linear programming, queuing theory, simulation, and quantitative decision-making methods for operations.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Global operations strategy, offshore manufacturing, and managing cross-border supply networks.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation applying operations management learning to an original applied business study.

sem4Subjects.name: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
sem4Subjects.description: Advanced ERP configuration, multi-plant deployment, MRP and MPS implementation, and ERP-driven process optimization.

sem4Subjects.name: Services Operations Management
sem4Subjects.description: Service delivery design, capacity planning for service industries, and customer experience operations management.

sem4Subjects.name: Total Quality Management
sem4Subjects.description: TQM philosophy, Six Sigma DMAIC, ISO 9001, Kaizen, and quality system implementation in manufacturing and services.

sem4Subjects.name: Production Planning and Control
sem4Subjects.description: Master production scheduling, material requirements planning, shop floor control, and production performance measurement.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Operations Management has 13 spec subjects across Sem 3-4. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
Operations Management MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Manufacturing, Logistics and warehousing, Process industries, EPC contractors, Retail operations

**Entry-level roles:** Operations Analyst, Production Planning Executive, Logistics Coordinator, Plant Administration Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Plant Manager, Operations Manager, Supply Chain Manager, Quality Head, Logistics Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Operations, Director of Manufacturing, COO, Head of Supply Chain, Plant Director

**Top hiring organisations:** Tata Motors, Mahindra, Bajaj Auto, L&T, Asian Paints, Sun Pharmaceutical, Delhivery, Blue Dart, Amazon India Operations

skills.body:
The Operations Management specialization builds skills that manufacturing and industrial employers test at plant manager and operations director levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Production Planning: MRP and MPS systems, aggregate production planning, capacity constraint management, and OEE improvement
- Total Quality Management: Six Sigma DMAIC methodology, SPC charts, ISO 9001 audit management, and Kaizen event facilitation
- ERP Operations: SAP PP and MM module configuration, production order management, and plant maintenance system administration
- Supply Chain: inventory optimisation, distribution network design, vendor performance management, and inbound logistics coordination

**Applied skills:**
- Operational Research: LP model formulation for scheduling and resource allocation, simulation modelling for capacity planning
- Services Operations: service level design, waiting line management, and customer experience metrics for service industry operations

**Soft skills:** Managing unionised shop-floor workforces, presenting OEE and quality data to plant boards, building cross-functional consensus for ERP rollouts and lean transformation programmes.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA Operations Management against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Production and Operations Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity covers lean manufacturing and quality management depth comparable to MUJ. MUJ's 13 Sem 3-4 subjects (vs Amity's spec-subject count) give more coverage including services operations and ERP. MUJ's Rs 1,53,000 upfront fee is 32% lower. Amity NIRF #22 is stronger for MNC manufacturing roles that weight university ranking.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Operations and Data Sciences Management:** NMIMS is NAAC A++ and NIRF Management #24 at Rs 1,96,000-2,20,000. NMIMS covers supply chain, IoT, and data sciences alongside operations. MUJ Operations is more manufacturing-specific (TQM, production planning, ERP). For manufacturing plant operations roles, MUJ is more targeted. For data-driven supply chain roles, NMIMS is stronger.

**vs LPU Online MBA Operations Management:** LPU is NAAC A++ with strong placement infrastructure in north India manufacturing. LPU does not offer Super/Dual spec flexibility. MUJ's 13 spec subjects, Coursera Plus, and Manipal brand recognition at pan-India manufacturers are advantages.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Operations Management can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Operations Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA Operations Management alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Rajesh Patil
items.liked: TQM and ERP content was directly applicable to my auto components plant operations. Six Sigma DMAIC framework was taught with practical depth
items.disliked: Industry 4.0 and IoT applications in manufacturing were not covered — a gap given how fast the sector is adopting automation
items.body: I manage a 300-person auto component plant. The production planning, Six Sigma, and ERP subjects gave me management frameworks I was missing after 8 years on the shop floor. Paired Operations Management with Supply Chain for an end-to-end operations profile. Got promoted to Plant Head 9 months after completing the degree. The Manipal NIRF #58 was specifically noted by our Group HR as a credible qualification.

items.name: Anita Sharma
items.liked: Operations research and production planning content was rigorous — gave quantitative tools I had been applying intuitively
items.disliked: LMS had connectivity issues during live sessions. Pre-recorded backup content was useful but real-time interaction suffered
items.body: I work in process operations at a chemical plant. The operations research module gave me LP-based scheduling tools I now use for production optimisation. The ERP module helped me manage our SAP implementation project better. The dual specialization with Analytics and Data Science opened doors to data-driven operations roles that I am now exploring. Manipal brand recognised at major chemical sector employers.

items.name: Mahesh Verma
items.liked: Services operations management content was useful for my logistics company role — typically absent from manufacturing-focused operations MBAs
items.disliked: Placement support was the main disappointment. The career cell had no connections with Jaipur-based manufacturing or logistics companies
items.body: Content coverage was broad — 13 spec subjects gave decent exposure across all operations areas. My criticism is that online student placement support is minimal. The campus MBA programme at Manipal Jaipur has company visits and placement drives that online students do not access. If you are self-sufficient with job search and need the credential, the programme delivers. If placement support is a priority, consider campus alternatives.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Super/Dual model allows you to pick 2 specializations at no extra cost. For Operations Management, strong pairings include: Operations plus Supply Chain Management (for end-to-end supply chain leadership), Operations plus Analytics and Data Science (for Industry 4.0 and data-driven operations), or Operations plus Project Management (for EPC and infrastructure project operations roles).

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is available to MUJ students at Rs 3,999 per year (standard Rs 13,999 — 70% off). For Operations students, Coursera Plus gives access to supply chain management, Six Sigma, and operations analytics courses from Rutgers University and University of California San Diego. The Rs 3,999 access is one of MUJ's most practical differentiators for working professionals.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: MUJ offers five non-stackable scholarship categories: 20% for Divyaang individuals, 20% for Defence personnel, 20% for MUJ alumni, 10% for Government employees, and 10% merit scholarship for 80%+ marks. In addition, upfront payment of the full fee gets a 15% fee concession — reducing total from Rs 1,80,000 to Rs 1,53,000.

faqs.question: Is this MBA useful for manufacturing engineers transitioning to management?
faqs.answer: Yes — this is the primary use case for Operations Management MBA. Engineers transitioning from production or quality roles use this degree to qualify for plant manager, operations head, and VP Operations positions that require a formal management credential. The production planning, TQM, and ERP content builds directly on manufacturing experience. Engineers with 5-10 years of plant experience typically get the most immediate return from this qualification.

faqs.question: What salary can Operations Management MBA graduates from MUJ expect?
faqs.answer: Plant managers and operations heads with 5-10 years experience and this MBA typically earn Rs 14-28 lakh at manufacturing companies. VP Operations and COO roles at mid-size manufacturers pay Rs 22-45 lakh. The degree most significantly impacts compensation when it qualifies a technical specialist for the formal management track. Supplementing with Six Sigma Green Belt or APICS CPIM strengthens the credentials combination for quality and supply chain leadership roles.

chooseIf: You are a production engineer, plant manager, or operations professional in manufacturing targeting plant director or VP Operations roles that require a management degree.
You want 13 spec subjects covering production planning, ERP, TQM, and supply chain at a NAAC A+ university under Rs 1.8 lakh.
You can pair Operations with Supply Chain or Analytics for a cross-functional operations credential using MUJ's Super/Dual specialization.
consider: You need the strongest manufacturing management brand for MNC plant director roles — NMIMS Operations or Amity Production and Operations carry stronger recognition at multinational manufacturers.
You are in service operations rather than manufacturing — verify whether the services operations subjects cover your specific sector adequately.
You need active placement support — MUJ online career services are limited for manufacturing roles outside Jaipur.
